meaning: n.坟墓,埋葬所,宗教圣物储藏所vt.埋,葬
examples: In this whirlwind of the sepulcher in which they stood, they still laughed freely.
In the sepulcher there by the sea.
Needing a moment to think, she wandered around the royal sepulcher.
Between sessions with the patriarchs, Benedict toured and prayed at the Church of the Holy Sepulcher, believed to be located on the site where Jesus was crucified and buried.
